---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or mapping
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of the problem or gap.

## Describe the solution you'd like
What should the adapter do?

## Which HL7v2 message/profile is affected?
Include message type, trigger event, and EHDS profile if applicable.

## Additional context
Any references, sample messages, or FHIR R4 expectations.
